description: Remove oversized top-left brand/setup chrome: no large Mega Vault Viewer H1, compact vault path disclosure/action row, keep status visible without consuming sidebar height.
acceptance: Top-left brand no longer renders as a large H1; vault path and sync/open controls are compact; browser smoke confirms title height/action sizing reduced.
verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; browser DOM smoke; npm run check

evidence.summary: Removed oversized top-left brand/setup chrome. Replaced large Mega Vault Viewer H1 with compact MVV/status bar; moved vault path into compact disclosure; shortened Open/Sync button to 34px compact action. Verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build, browser DOM smoke h1=[] brandHeight=26 titleFont=12px buttonHeight=34 setupHeight=77 blank=false, npm run check, go validate.
